name: Sun Pacific Holding Corp.
business: Sun Pacific Holding Corp. sells Next Generation solar panel and lighting products, solar bus stops, solar trashcans, and street kiosks that utilize advertising offerings to provide cost-efficient solutions to state and local municipalities. The company's principal source of revenues is derived from its subsidiary Street Smart Outdoor Corp. operating in the outdoor advertising business with contracts in New Jersey and Florida. The company also has agreements to distribute inverter and energy storage solutions from FoxEss and to manufacture solar panels through an OEM arrangement.

exposures.sentence: Utilizing management s history in general contracting, coupled with our subject matter expertise and intellectual property ( IP ) knowledge of solar panels and other leading-edge technologies, the Company is focused on building a Next Generation green energy company.

Sun Pacific Power Corp. has entered into an agreement with FoxEss, a global leader in the development of inverter and energy storage solutions as a wholesale distributer for North and South America and Australia.

catalysts.event: Commenced sales, marketing, and affiliate program for residential solar panels
catalysts.sentence: Sun Pacific Power Corp has also commenced in April 2023, a sales, marketing, and affiliate program to market and install residential solar panels in various markets within the United States.
